title: ClinicianReview
description: A clinician's review of AI-generated medical content. Clinicians can approve, correct, or request revision of AI summaries. Reviews are linked to a case and authored by a specific clinician. Only the authoring clinician can update their own review.

id.description: Globally unique identifier (UUID v4). Assigned by the system on creation.

caseId.description: Foreign key to the Case this review belongs to.

clinicianId.description: Foreign key to the User (clinician) who authored this review. Only this user can update the review.

reviewType.description: Type of review. ai_summary_approval: approving AI-generated content. recommendation: adding clinical guidance. correction: pointing out errors in AI output.

content.description: Review content. HTML is sanitized before storage. Supports plain text and basic formatting.

status.description: Review lifecycle status. Transitions: pending → approved, pending → revision_requested, revision_requested → approved.

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the clinician submitted their review (status changed from pending). Null while still pending.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this review was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last modification.

examples.content: Summary accurately reflects the biopsy findings. Staging is correct at T2N0M0. Approved for care coordination use.
The staging should be T2N1M0, not T2N0M0. Lymph node involvement was noted in the pathology report. Please regenerate the summary.
